import re

xml_file = '/home/runner/.nuget/packages/modelcontextprotocol/1.2.0/lib/net9.0/ModelContextProtocol.xml'
with open(xml_file, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find all member blocks for key methods
patterns = [
    (r'<member name="M:Microsoft\.Extensions\.DependencyInjection\.McpServerBuilderExtensions\.WithTools[^"]*">(.*?)</member>', 'WithTools'),
    (r'<member name="M:Microsoft\.Extensions\.DependencyInjection\.McpServerBuilderExtensions\.WithResources[^"]*">(.*?)</member>', 'WithResources'),
    (r'<member name="M:Microsoft\.AspNetCore\.Builder\.McpEndpointRouteBuilderExtensions\.MapMcp[^"]*">(.*?)</member>', 'MapMcp'),
    (r'<member name="M:Microsoft\.Extensions\.DependencyInjection\.McpServerServiceCollectionExtensions\.AddMcpServer[^"]*">(.*?)</member>', 'AddMcpServer'),
    (r'<member name="M:Microsoft\.Extensions\.DependencyInjection\.HttpMcpServerBuilderExtensions\.WithHttpTransport[^"]*">(.*?)</member>', 'WithHttpTransport'),
]

for pattern, name in patterns:
    matches = re.findall(pattern, content, re.DOTALL)
    if matches:
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"METHOD: {name}")
        print(f"{'='*60}")
        for i, match in enumerate(matches[:3], 1):
            print(f"\n--- Overload {i} ---")
            # Extract summary
            summary_match = re.search(r'<summary>(.*?)</summary>', match, re.DOTALL)
            if summary_match:
                summary = summary_match.group(1).strip()
                summary = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', summary)
                print(f"Summary: {summary[:200]}")
            
            # Extract params
            param_matches = re.findall(r'<param name="([^"]+)">([^<]+)</param>', match)
            if param_matches:
                print("Parameters:")
                for param_name, param_desc in param_matches:
                    print(f"  {param_name}: {param_desc.strip()[:80]}")
            
            # Extract return info
            return_match = re.search(r'<returns>([^<]+)</returns>', match)
            if return_match:
                print(f"Returns: {return_match.group(1).strip()[:100]}")

EOF

# Read the XML and extract just the attributes we need
import re

xml_file = '/home/runner/.nuget/packages/modelcontextprotocol/1.2.0/lib/net9.0/ModelContextProtocol.xml'
with open(xml_file, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Extract full member documentation
patterns = [
    ('McpServerToolAttribute', r'member name="T:ModelContextProtocol\.Server\.McpServerToolAttribute"[^>]*>(.*?)</member>'),
    ('McpServerResourceAttribute', r'member name="T:ModelContextProtocol\.Server\.McpServerResourceAttribute"[^>]*>(.*?)</member>'),
    ('McpServerToolTypeAttribute', r'member name="T:ModelContextProtocol\.Server\.McpServerToolTypeAttribute"[^>]*>(.*?)</member>'),
    ('McpServerResourceTypeAttribute', r'member name="T:ModelContextProtocol\.Server\.McpServerResourceTypeAttribute"[^>]*>(.*?)</member>'),
]

for name, pattern in patterns:
    match = re.search(pattern, content, re.DOTALL)
    if match:
        text = match.group(1)
        print(f"\n{'='*70}")
        print(f"ATTRIBUTE: {name}")
        print(f"{'='*70}")
        
        # Extract and clean text
        summary_m = re.search(r'<summary>(.*?)</summary>', text, re.DOTALL)
        if summary_m:
            summary = summary_m.group(1).strip()
            summary = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', summary)
            summary = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', summary)
            print(f"Summary:\n  {summary[:300]}")
        
        remarks_m = re.search(r'<remarks>(.*?)</remarks>', text, re.DOTALL)
        if remarks_m:
            remarks = remarks_m.group(1).strip()
            remarks = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', remarks)
            remarks = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', remarks)
            print(f"\nRemarks:\n  {remarks[:400]}")

EOF
